name: @perfectghy/ways
description: WAYS — Worker, Are You Sleeping? — detects open Developer Tools with 100% reliability, across all platforms. Most common evasion tricks won't work. (Disabling JS? Sure, but then DevTools are pointless too.)

scripts.build: npm run clean && cross-env NODE_ENV=production webpack
scripts.dev: npm run clean && cross-env NODE_ENV=development webpack
scripts.watch: npm run clean && cross-env NODE_ENV=development webpack --watch
scripts.serve: npm run clean && cross-env NODE_ENV=development webpack serve
